mapper.insert:
insert into cost_calc_task_partition ( task_id, task_no, partition_no, start_item_no, end_item_no, partition_status, total_count, processed_count, success_count, fail_count, amount_total, last_error ) values
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.taskNo}, #{item.partitionNo}, #{item.startItemNo}, #{item.endItemNo}, #{item.partitionStatus}, #{item.totalCount}, #{item.processedCount}, #{item.successCount}, #{item.failCount}, #{item.amountTotal}, #{item.lastError} )
